title: Advanced AFK Zone
description: A high-performance AFK hub plugin that teleports players to a safe, custom-generated End dimension. Players passively earn Shards over time which can be spent in a built-in GUI shop for premium rewards!
body:
![AdvancedAFKZone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0e8a655fe36c83670defa2f7fbb2ca978782f52_0.webp)



![What is the plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/275d99b9dd14cf35e0324249b846b15f8dde65d2_0.webp)
Advanced AFK Zone is a lightweight, lag-free plugin that rewards idle players when they teleport to a safe, custom-generated End dimension. While AFK, players passively collect "Shards" which can be used to purchase premium items, gear, and custom rewards from a fully configurable built-in GUI shop. This system turns inactive playtime into meaningful progression without clogging up main-world mob farms or harming server TPS.


![Main features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad79ef22763576d1caf45cf9912b5532d9206f8_0.webp)
Custom Dimension Generation: Automatically builds a safe, stylized End dimension (with a glass dome, paths, houses, and trees) specifically for AFK players and it can be changed by server owner.
Zero Lag Impact: Aggressively clears and prevents mob spawning,
Shard Economy: Introduces a unique, currency ("Shards") that players earn automatically while idling in the AFK Zone.
Built-in GUI Shop: A fully customizable, large inventory shop where players can spend their Shards on Max Enchanted Netherite gear, Elytras, and other premium items by deffault.
PlaceholderAPI Support: Fully integrated with PlaceholderAPI (using %afkzone_shards%) so you can display Shard balances on scoreboards, holograms, or chat formats.
Safe Teleportation: Automatically saves the player's previous location and safely handles their teleportation back and forth without glitches or death risks.


![Why use it?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3b1fbdccfff4204a9a691682205eeace298d4d_0.webp)
Unmanaged AFK players can ruin your server's TPS by keeping main-world mob farms and redstone chunks loaded. Advanced AFK Zone solves this by safely moving them to an isolated, 0-lag custom dimension. Not only does this save your server performance, but the built-in Shard economy gives players a fun, long-term reason to stay online!



![installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a4b844130d8148b57dc427e01350b27a61755fd_0.webp)
1. Download the latest `AdvancedAFKZone.jar` file.
2. Drop the `.jar` file into your server's `/plugins` folder.
3. Restart your server to generate the configuration files.
4. *(Optional but Recommended)* Install **PlaceholderAPI** to utilize the `%afkzone_shards%` placeholder on your scoreboards, chat formatting, or holograms.
5. Open `plugins/AdvancedAFKZone/config.yml` to fully customize the shop items, shard payouts, and AFK intervals to your liking!



![commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93aa92b9f80fac84493b03f2c2c78a0f0cfa06ed_0.webp)
`/afk` - Teleports the player to the safe AFK zone, type it again to leave the AFK zone

`/afkshop` - Opens the custom rewards GUI using Shards.

`/shards` - Check your current Shard balance.

`/afkzone info|reload` - Plugin info and reload configuration (`afkzone.admin`).
